name: CurveExtensionStyle
summary: Defines enumerated values for styles to use during curve extension, such as "Line", "Arc" or "Smooth".

enum_values.name: Line
enum_values.summary: Curve ends will be propagated linearly according to tangents.

enum_values.name: Arc
enum_values.summary: Curve ends will be propagated arc-wise according to curvature.

enum_values.name: Smooth
enum_values.summary: Curve ends will be propagated smoothly according to curvature.
